title: Bind
body:
This is a simple mod that allows you to place your tools as blocks in the world.

Right click + Shift with a tool that is efficient for that block, like shovels on grass or axes on wooden blocks, etc.

It's useful when you want to save inventory space or simply to perserve your tool at a specific place in case you die.

Currently works mainly with vanilla-like tools and has support for the following mod tools:
+ [Better With Time](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-with-time) (Mattock & Battle Axe)
+ [Tough Environment](https://modrinth.com/mod/tough-environment) (Chisels)

---

**Acknowledgment:** This mod ports functionality from the Better Than Wolves Mod, which was created by FlowerChild and is currently maintained by the CE Team. Link to the original mod -> [**here**](https://btwce.com/)
